message:
test(conformance): expand P2C-002 linalg test suite with eigenvalue operations and update parity reports

Significantly expand the FSCI-P2C-002 (linalg core) conformance fixture
with new test cases covering eigenvalue operations: eig, eigh, eigvals,
and eigvalsh across various matrix types (symmetric, hermitian, general,
diagonal, triangular).

Update parity reports for both P2C-001 and P2C-002 with regenerated
hash values, decode proof artifacts, and RaptorQ coverage metrics to
reflect the expanded test surface and the new CASP solver changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
